title: Implement sweech use <name> command
description: Add a direct profile switch command that sets the active profile without launching the interactive TUI. Referenced in SweechBar guide and docs but not implemented.

context.text: Implemented in commit. All 599 tests pass.

acceptanceCriteria: sweech use <name> sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR and launches the CLI
Exit code 0 on success, 1 on invalid profile
